summary: High‑quality recording captures a killer spring ’93 show with standout Shakedown/Wang Dang Doodle, Dark Star, The Other One, Lucy in the Sky with Diamonds and a Handsome Cabin Boy/Shady Grove jam.
review: Both reviewers rave about this 1993 period performance, highlighting an explosive set two that includes Shakedown/Wang Dang Doodle, a soaring Dark Star into The Other One, a dazzling Lucy in the Sky with Diamonds and a memorable Handsome Cabin Boy (Shady Grove) jam.  The recording is praised as high‑quality and essential for fans of the era, with no technical complaints noted.

ai_rating.rationale: Both reviews give 5 stars and describe an exceptional show and excellent recording; limited to two reviews so confidence is low.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls it a high‑quality recording and a must‑have for the 1993 period; no issues mentioned.

standout_songs: Lucy in the Sky with Diamonds
show_quality.setlist_flow: Enthusiastic description of a ‘set list from hell’ with a killer second set featuring extended jams and classic psychedelic peaks.
